name: probabl-skills
description: Skills to support Machine Learning experimentation using the Python ecosystem.

skills.title: Explore ML Data
skills.summary: Explore the dataset before designing any model.

skills.title: Build ML Pipeline
skills.summary: Build a machine learning pipeline from the data source to the learner, including multi-tables engineering.

skills.title: Evaluate ML Pipeline
skills.summary: Evaluate a complex machine learning pipeline and get structured reports including metrics, plots, and diagnostics.

skills.title: Test ML Pipeline
skills.summary: Make sure that your machine learning pipeline is production-ready statistically and functionally.

skills.title: Smoke Test ML Pipeline
skills.summary: Stress test your machine learning pipeline on future data to make sure it works.

skills.title: Audit ML Pipeline
skills.summary: Once testing and the experiment is done, audit by loading a skore report and investigate.

skills.title: Iterate ML Experiment
skills.summary: Design, keep track of experiments and iterate on them.

skills.title: Iterate from Skore
skills.summary: Use skore to run diagnostics and checks that can be reported and addressed in the next experiment.

skills.title: Iterate from User
skills.summary: As a user be in the loop and propose new experiments — free-text, a scientific article URL, or a resource link (GitHub issue / spec / reference repo).

skills.title: Organize ML Workspace
skills.summary: An organized workspace to keep track of your experiments.

skills.title: Python Code Style
skills.summary: Enforce good practices out-of-the-box for the Python ecosystem for your code.

skills.title: Python Environment Manager
skills.summary: Bootstrapping the experiment setup based on your favorite Python environment manager.

skills.title: Data Science Python Stack
skills.summary: Opinionated one-library-per-job Python stack, organized into mandatory / user-choice / optional / transitive tiers.

skills.title: Python API Discovery
skills.summary: Discover the public API of any installed Python package to make agent find their way without bothering your workspace.

workflows.title: ML Experimentation Companion
workflows.summary: A machine learning experiment companion. Focus on the science, the companion organizes the rest with organized workspaces and reporting, auditable results where you are still the owner.
